'''âzh-sh-j-sh''' ('''kazhashjeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jerrybuild|jerrybuild]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jerrybuild|jerrybuild]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-sh-j-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kazhashjeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhashjeshoko|thizhashjeshoko]] || [[word:jizhashjeshoko|jizhashjeshoko]] || [[word:shizhashjeshoko|shizhashjeshoko]] || [[word:kizhashjeshoko|kizhashjeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhashjeshoko|thuthuzhashjeshoko]] || [[word:jujuzhashjeshoko|jujuzhashjeshoko]] || [[word:shushuzhashjeshoko|shushuzhashjeshoko]] || [[word:kukuzhashjeshoko|kukuzhashjeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhashjeshoko|thozhashjeshoko]] || [[word:jozhashjeshoko|jozhashjeshoko]] || [[word:shozhashjeshoko|shozhashjeshoko]] || [[word:kozhashjeshoko|kozhashjeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhashjeshoko|thozhashjeshoko]] || [[word:jozhashjeshoko|jozhashjeshoko]] || [[word:shozhashjeshoko|shozhashjeshoko]] || [[word:kozhashjeshoko|kozhashjeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhashjeshoko|thĂŠzhashjeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzhashjeshoko|jĂŠzhashjeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzhashjeshoko|shĂŠzhashjeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzhashjeshoko|kĂŠzhashjeshoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhashjeshoko|thazhashjeshoko]] || [[word:jazhashjeshoko|jazhashjeshoko]] || [[word:shazhashjeshoko|shazhashjeshoko]] || [[word:kazhashjeshoko|kazhashjeshoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
